subject: Great meeting you, Moly Leelatham
body:
Hi Moly Leelatham,

Really enjoyed our chat about ai, gtm, revops, hiring, technology, re scaling, scaling gtm, clark biggest, biggest pain, follow up, up after, after back, back meetings, s exactly, budget approved, consolidating three, three tools, relational, skeptical, need faster, faster conference, conference follow. Following up with what we discussed and a couple of ideas for CLARK.

[Lightfern will polish this in Gmail]
